build.beforeDevCommand: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html app.js style.css icon.png dist/ && npx -y http-server dist -p 1420
build.beforeBuildCommand: mkdir -p dist && cp index.html app.js style.css icon.png dist/

security.csp: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self' https://cdnjs.cloudflare.com https://cdn.jsdelivr.net; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline' https://fonts.googleapis.com; font-src 'self' https://fonts.gstatic.com; img-src 'self' data:; connect-src 'self'
